com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces

Interface IAccessGate

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IMultipleAntenna, IUHF, IUHFA4, IUHFAx
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    RFIDWithUHFNetworkAccessGate, RFIDWithUHFSerialPortAccessGate

    public interface IAccessGate
extends IUHFA4

    • Field Summary

      获取触发通道门某些状态(进或者出)时蓝灯亮（When certain states (enter or exit) of the trigger channel gate are activated, the blue light turns on.）
      BuzzerEntity getBuzzerWhenTheGateStateChanges()
      获取触发通道门某些状态(进或者出)时蜂鸣器发声（When certain states (enter or exit) of the trigger channel gate are activated, the buzzer sounds.）

      获取启用\禁用警报(Get Enable\disable alarms)

      获取是否启用大音量的蜂鸣器。（Get whether to enable the buzzer with a loud volume.）
      int getEnableReportingMatch()
      获取启用\禁用上报标签之前需要进行匹配 (Tags must be matched before being reported.)
      GateWorkTimeEntity getGateWorkTime()
      获取通道门的工作时间 （Get the working time of the channel gate.）

      获取触发通道门某些状态(进或者出)时开始盘点.（When certain states (enter or exit) of the trigger channel gate are activated, start inventory.）

      • setBlueLightWhenTheGateStateChanges

        boolean setBlueLightWhenTheGateStateChanges(BlueLightEntity entity)
        设置触发通道门某些状态(进或者出)时蓝灯亮（When certain states (enter or exit) of the trigger channel gate are activated, the blue light turns on.）
        Parameters:
        entity - BlueLightEntity
        Returns:
        true:success false:fail
